zh.Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伯頓 拉梅
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Chandler III於1527年出生在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德時，他的父親Thomas Chandler27歲，母親Agnes Bishop25歲。他於1546年7月19日與Joane Momfort Paige在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伯頓 拉梅結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1611年6月4日在他的家鄉享年84歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾畢曉普 金可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Chandler III于1527年出生在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德时，他的父亲Thomas Chandler27岁，母亲Agnes Bishop25岁。他于1546年7月19日与Joane Momfort Paige在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾伯頓 拉梅结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1611年6月4日在他的家乡享年84岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰洛-爾畢曉普 金可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Chandler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a maker and seller of candles, from Anglo-Norman French chandeler ‘maker or seller of candles’ (Old French chandelier, Late Latin candelarius, a derivative of candela ‘candle’). While a medieval chandler no doubt made and sold other articles beside candles, the extended sense of modern English chandler does not occur until the 16th century. The name may also, more rarely, have denoted someone who was responsible for the lighting arrangements in a large house, or else one who owed rent in the form of wax or candles.

variants.name: Candler
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): variant of   Chandler  .
German: variant of Kandler and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Candler is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Chandler III was born in 1527, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Chandler, was 27 and his mother, Agnes Bishop, was 25. He married Joane Momfort Paige on 19 July 1546, in Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 June 1611, in his hometown, at the age of 84, and was buried in Bishop Kinkell, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Chandler III est né en 1527, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Chandler, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes Bishop, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joane Momfort Paige le 19 juillet 1546, à Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1611, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Bishop Kinkell, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Chandler III è nato il nel 1527 nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Chandler, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Bishop, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joane Momfort Paige il 19 luglio 1546, nel Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1611, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Bishop Kinkell, Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Chandler IIIが1527年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Chandlerは27歳，母Agnes Bishopは25歳であった。1546年7月19日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブルトン ラティマーでJoane Momfort Paigeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1611年6月4日に故郷で84歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアビショップ キンケルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Chandler III(이)가 1527년 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Chandler(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Bishop(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1546년 7월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 버턴 레이팀어에서 Joane Momfort Paige(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1611년 6월 4일 그의 고향에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 비숍 킨켈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Chandler III nasceu em 1527, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Chandler, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Bishop, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Momfort Paige em 19 de julho de 1546, em Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1611, em sua cidade natal, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishop Kinkell, Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Chandler III родился в 1527 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Chandler было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Bishop, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Momfort Paige 19 июля 1546 г. в местности буртон латимир, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 июня 1611 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности бишоп кинкелл, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Chandler III nació en 1527, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Chandler, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes Bishop, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joane Momfort Paige el 19 de julio de 1546, en Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1611, en su pueblo, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Bishop Kinkell, Ross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
